title: stenostomum coriaceum
intro: Stenostomum coriaceum, also known as the rough-leaved stenostomum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat fever and inflammation. The health benefits of Stenostomum coriaceum include its use as an anti-inflammatory agent and its potential in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
